subcodes.first_line: O thou who followest Noah, the Deliverer! Like unto Him, thou art a carpenter by trade, who built with His craft the Ark of Salvation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اتبع نوح النجی ای نجار حضرت نوح را همحرفه و همصنعت او سفینه نجات ساخت و
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Noah, @stories; anecdotes, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
